description_long: A round, dark-colored bowl filled with ramen sits at the center, featuring a rich assortment of toppings including slices of meat, a boiled egg, and leafy greens. The bowl is accompanied by a pair of wooden chopsticks, which rest across the rim or are propped up at an angle depending on the view. The ramen toppings are neatly arranged, with the egg and meat slices clearly visible on the surface, and a piece of nori (seaweed) standing upright at the back. The broth appears to be light in color, with a slightly cloudy texture, and the noodles are partially visible beneath the toppings. The bowl itself has a simple, unadorned design with a smooth, matte finish. The overall presentation is inviting and typical of a well-prepared ramen dish found in urban eateries.
description: A dark, round bowl of ramen with assorted toppings and wooden chopsticks, featuring a visually appealing arrangement of ingredients and a light, cloudy broth.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from a low angle with chopsticks resting horizontally across the top, highlighting the egg and meat slices in the center.
description_view_1: This view shows the chopsticks propped vertically at the side of the bowl, with the nori sheet and toppings clearly visible and well-arranged.
description_view_2: The bowl is viewed from the opposite side, with chopsticks again resting across the rim and the toppings, especially the egg, prominently displayed.
description_view_3: Chopsticks are positioned upright at the edge of the bowl, and the arrangement of toppings, including the nori and egg, is visible from a slightly different angle.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is round with a smooth, unadorned surface and a dark brown color. It has a simple, slightly flared rim and a matte finish, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. The ceramic material gives it a sturdy and classic appearance.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings are neatly grouped on the surface, with slices of meat and a halved boiled egg placed centrally, and a piece of nori standing upright at the back. Leafy greens and other garnishes are arranged to one side, creating a balanced and visually appealing presentation.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are partially exposed, visible beneath the toppings but mostly submerged in the broth. Only a few strands peek out from under the meat and egg.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears light and slightly cloudy, with a soft, opaque quality. There are no distinct floating particles or oil droplets visible.
attribute_utensil_presence: A pair of wooden chopsticks is present, either resting across the rim or propped upright at the edge of the bowl. The chopsticks are simple and unadorned, matching the bowl's understated style.
